case_title: UNIFUND CCR, LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY VS. SERGIO GONZALEZ et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-06-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR, LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY SERVED APR-27-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, SERGIO

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR, LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, SERGIO DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-14-2014
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B) FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR, LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY
NOTICE OF STAY OF PROCEEDINGS REGARDING BANKRUPTCY FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR, LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAY-06-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR STATUS REPORT RE BANKRUPTCY. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
